color.name: --color-action-primary-hover
color.usage: Button primary variant's fill on hover.

color.name: --color-action-secondary-hover
color.usage: Button secondary variant's fill on hover — a white overlay at 10% opacity, not a solid color, so it reads correctly over any background.

color.name: --color-action-highlight
color.usage: Button accent variant's fill (default/disabled state); also Button link variant's default text color.

color.name: --color-action-highlight-hover
color.usage: Button accent variant's fill on hover; also Button link variant's hover text color.

color.name: --color-border-default
color.usage: Button secondary variant's resting border; also the resting border for every Input-family control (Input/Select/Textarea/Checkbox).

color.name: --color-border-focus
color.usage: Focus-ring border for Button primary/secondary/link and every Input-family control. Button accent's focus ring uses border-default instead — a real, literal Figma difference, not an inconsistency.

color.name: --color-border-subtle
color.usage: Hover-state border color for every Input-family control.

color.name: --color-text-primary
color.usage: Default body text color; also the typed-value color for Input-family controls when focused (see Input's placeholder-vs-value reconstruction).

color.name: --color-text-inverse
color.usage: Text/border color for content meant to sit on a dark or colored surface (Button secondary variant, Checkbox's label) — assumes a dark backdrop, see Checkbox's Storybook decorator for why.

color.name: --color-text-muted
color.usage: Placeholder text color for Input-family controls; also Checkbox's disabled-state checkmark/label color.

color.name: --color-text-highlight
color.usage: Checkbox's checkmark glyph; same value as action-highlight/border-focus, kept as a distinct token.

color.name: --color-surface-primary
color.usage: Default background fill for every Input-family control.

color.name: --color-surface-feature
color.usage: Bound to Card's background in Figma; distinct token from surface-primary even though unrelated in value.

color.name: --color-state-hover
color.usage: Background fill for Input-family controls on hover.

color.name: --color-state-disabled
color.usage: Border color for Input-family controls in the disabled state.

color.name: --color-sand-400
color.usage: Primitive palette token; Card binds to this directly rather than a semantic text/surface token.

typography.name: --text-h6
typography.usage: Button large-size label text; also the large-size value/label text for every Input-family control (Input/Select/Textarea/Checkbox).

typography.name: --text-paragraph-small
typography.usage: Card's date/time/description text; also the small-size value/label text for every Input-family control.

typography.name: --text-h3
typography.usage: Card's title text style — the only place the Recoleta display face is used.

spacing.name: --spacing-00
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

spacing.name: --spacing-01
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

spacing.name: --spacing-02
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

spacing.name: --spacing-03
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

radius.name: --radius-sm
radius.usage: Overrides Tailwind's default rounded-sm (2px) / rounded-xl (12px) / rounded-2xl (16px) scale to match the extracted radius tokens.

radius.name: --radius-xl
radius.usage: Overrides Tailwind's default rounded-sm (2px) / rounded-xl (12px) / rounded-2xl (16px) scale to match the extracted radius tokens.

radius.name: --radius-2xl
radius.usage: Overrides Tailwind's default rounded-sm (2px) / rounded-xl (12px) / rounded-2xl (16px) scale to match the extracted radius tokens.

motion.name: --duration-standard / --ease-standard
motion.usage: Not Figma-sourced (the file has no motion variables). Formalizes the identical transition-colors duration-150 ease-out already used in Button/Input/Select/Textarea/Checkbox.

breakpoint.name: --breakpoint-tablet
breakpoint.usage: Not Figma-sourced (no breakpoint variables exist in the file) and not yet used by any of the 6 built components (none are responsive). Formalizes the one breakpoint value already used repeatedly across the pre-existing app shell (src/index.css, src/App.css). Tailwind's own default scale (sm 640px / md 768px / lg 1024px / xl 1280px / 2xl 1536px) is available but not customized or formally adopted by this design system.

shadowNote: No shadow tokens are defined. The Figma source file has zero effect styles, and no component in this system currently uses box-shadow. This is an accurate empty state, not an omission — see the Shadows foundation page.
